17.anchor: This kind of talk spreads like cancer,

6.anchor: They are the kind who work their way into people’s homes and win the confidence of

12.anchor: That is why I am suffering here in prison. But I am not ashamed of it, for I know the one in whom I trust, and I am sure that he is able to guard what I have entrusted to him
12.note: Or what has been entrusted to me.

13.anchor: When you come, be sure to bring the coat I left with Carpus at Troas. Also bring my books, and especially my papers.

17.anchor: But the Lord stood with me and gave me strength so that I might preach the Good News in its entirety for all the Gentiles to hear. And he rescued me from certain death.
17.note: Greek from the mouth of a lion.

21.anchor: Do your best to get here before winter. Eubulus sends you greetings, and so do Pudens, Linus, Claudia, and all the brothers and sisters.
